prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-FIRSTAIDKIT-50PC-PARENT Product Type: FIRST_AID_KIT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 50pc Portable First Aid Kit in Waterproof Case Emergency Supplies Survival Gear (Assorted Packs) Description: Where mother nature rules, it never hurts to be prepared. Pack ASR Outdoors 50pc Portable First Aid Kit on your next camping or hiking adventure, or with your emergency supplies, bug out bag, survival gear and more. All first aid items come packed in a handy lockable and waterproof container; the kit also includes a lanyard and 5mm carabiner, so you can easily attach the first aid kit to your backpack or other outdoor gear.

The first aid includes: 2 Sting Relief Wipes, 4 Cleaning Wipes, 10 Cotton Swabs, 10 Adhesive Bandages that measure 72 x 19mm, 10 Adhesive Bandages that measure 56 x 19mm, 10 Adhesive Bandages that measure 40 x 10mm, 2 Gauze Pads that measure 2x2 inches and lastly, a single H Bandage. The entire first aid kit measures just 5 x 4 x 1.25 inches, and weighs in at only 0.2 pounds or 3.2 ounces, making it a great size for keeping in your car, boat or backpack while traveling, camping, hiking and more.

Emergency situations can arise at any time, and sometimes when you least expect them. While this first aid kit is minimal and lightweight, boasting great portability and designed for travel, it never hurts to keep with outdoor gear in the event of minor scrapes or cuts, bee stings, cleaning wounds and more. Packed in a lockable, waterproof carry case, it can withstand wet weather, a drop in the river and lots of wear and tear.

Available in a 1 pack or 2 pack. Search Terms: First aid kit hiking backpacking outdoor survival gear travel camping essentials emergency supplies bug out bag car RV accessories waterproof pouch natural disaster emergency preparedness items lanyard carabiner Features: - 50PC FIRST AID KIT: From sting relief wipes and cotton swabs, to adhesive bandages and more, this compact, lightweight and portable travel friendly first aid kit is ideal for treating minor cuts and wounds when adventuring in the great outdoors - WATERPROOF POUCH: All fifty pieces are neatly packed in a reusable, lockable and waterproof container that can withstand bad weather, a drop in the lake or ocean and will hold up to years of wear and tear - LANYARD AND CARABINER: Easily attach this mini first aid kit to your person, backpack or other outdoor gear via a lanyard and 5mm carabiner; mountable lightweight first aid kit makes it easy to pack and travel with whether camping, hiking, backpacking and more - EMERGENCY SUPPLIES: Whether you keep this 50pc first aid kit with your emergency supplies, survival gear or emergency preparedness items, know that you’ll be able to tackle and manage minor injuries when a friend or family member need it most - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 5 x 4 x 1.5 inches; Weight: 0.2lbs; Color: Red === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 50pc Red Portable First Aid Kit Waterproof

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 50-Pc Portable First Aid Kit

anthropic.title_differentiation: Waterproof Case, Lanyard And Carabiner, Emergency Supplies, Hiking Camping Survival Gear, Lightweight Travel

openai.title_differentiation: Waterproof Lockable Case, 50 Pieces, Lanyard And 5Mm Carabiner, Compact Travel Emergency Supplies
